---
title: "My Journey in STEM"
subtitle: "From Sydney to San Francisco — HPC, Cloud, and Quantum"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
author: Cameron Rutherford
format:
  revealjs:
    output-ext: reveal.html
    theme: night
    smaller: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    menu: true
    chalkboard: false
    slide-level: 3
  html:
    toc: true
revealjs-plugins:
  - confetti
  - seminar
  - poll
  - questions
---

### Welcome!

Scan the QR code or visit the link to follow along:

{{< qrcode https://cameronrutherford.quarto.pub/camerons-git-site/presentations/minds-matter/presentation.reveal.html follow-along >}}

## Growing Up

### Australian / American Dual Citizenship

*[Photo placeholder]*

### Basketball

*[Photo placeholder]*

## High School

### Sydney Grammar School

*[Photo placeholder]*

### ATAR & HSC

*[Content placeholder — the stress, the system, the scores]*

## College

### Whitworth University

*[Photo placeholder]*

### Academics & Basketball

*[Content placeholder]*

## Career

### PNNL — National Lab Research

*[Content placeholder — ExaGO, E3SM, supercomputers]*

### AWS — Cloud & Quantum

*[Content placeholder — current role, CQC]*

## What is HPC / Cloud / Quantum?

### High Performance Computing

*[Content placeholder]*

### Cloud Computing & AWS

*[Content placeholder]*

### Quantum Computing

*[Content placeholder]*

### Quick Poll: What interests you most?

<div class="poll" data-poll="interest">
  <button data-value="HPC">High Performance Computing</button>
  <button data-value="Cloud">Cloud / AWS</button>
  <button data-value="Quantum">Quantum Computing</button>
  <button data-value="AI">AI / Machine Learning</button>
</div>

Results: <span class="voters" data-poll="interest">0</span> votes

- HPC: <span class="results" data-poll="interest"><span data-value="HPC">0</span></span>
- Cloud: <span class="results" data-poll="interest"><span data-value="Cloud">0</span></span>
- Quantum: <span class="results" data-poll="interest"><span data-value="Quantum">0</span></span>
- AI: <span class="results" data-poll="interest"><span data-value="AI">0</span></span>

## Thank You!

### Questions?

*[Q&A section]*
